selectZip.title: Select Zip
selectZip.description: Choose the package you want to import.

reviewPlan.title: Review Plan
reviewPlan.description: Check the generated pages and paths.

runImport.title: Run Import
runImport.description: Watch progress while the importer works.

reviewResult.title: Review Result
reviewResult.description: Inspect imported, skipped, or failed items.

beforeStart.title: Before You Start
beforeStart.description: Import a zip archive with Markdown files. LeafWiki first creates a review plan, and only imports pages after you explicitly start the execution step.
beforeStart.safeReviewText: Creating the plan does not import pages yet.
beforeStart.linksAssetsText: Internal links and embedded assets are rewritten during import.
beforeStart.alphaText: Some Markdown variants may still need manual cleanup afterward.

nextAction.chooseZip: Choose a zip file and create an import plan.
nextAction.reviewPlan: Review the generated items, then start the import.
nextAction.cancelRequested: Cancellation was requested. The importer will stop after the current item finishes.
nextAction.running: The import is running. You can stay on this page and watch the progress update.
nextAction.completed: The import finished successfully. Review the result below, or start a new import with another zip package.
nextAction.failed: The import stopped with an error. Check the message and result items below.
nextAction.canceled: The import was canceled. Completed work was kept and is shown below.
nextAction.selectZip: Select a zip file to begin.

package.title: Choose Import Package
package.description: Select a zip archive that contains Markdown files. After that, we create a preview plan so you can inspect paths, actions, and notes before the import runs.
package.issuesHint: If you run into problems, unexpected results, or unsupported edge cases, please create an issue on our
package.supportedInput: Supported input: a single `.zip` archive containing your Markdown knowledge base.
package.planOnlyHint: This only creates the review plan. No pages are imported until you click `Execute Import Plan`.

plan.title: Import Plan
plan.description: Review what LeafWiki is about to create, update, or skip before you start the import.
plan.runningCopy: The import is running in the background. You can stay on this page to watch progress.
plan.cancelRequestedCopy: Cancellation has been requested. The importer will stop after the current item finishes.
plan.canceledCopy: The import was canceled. Completed items were kept, and the partial result is shown below.
plan.plannedItemsDescription: These are the individual files LeafWiki detected in the package and how they map to target pages.

run.title: Run Import
run.descriptionPlan: Start the import once the plan looks correct. You can also clear the current plan and begin again with a different package.
run.descriptionRunning: The importer is currently working through the generated plan. You can stay on this page to monitor progress or request cancellation.

result.title: Import Result
result.description: This is the final outcome of the import. Skipped items usually need manual review, while failed items need attention before retrying.
result.anotherPackageBody: Start a new import to clear this result and choose a different zip file.
result.filterDescription: Use the filters to focus on successful imports, skipped items, or failures.
result.filterPlaceholder: Filter by path, action, or error
result.noMatchingItems: No items match the current filter.

toast.cancelFailed: Failed to cancel or clear import plan
